sentences.target: Wir besuchen ein historisch bedeutendes Museum.

translations.de: Wir besuchen ein historisch bedeutendes Museum.
translations.en: We’re visiting a historically important museum.
translations.es: Estamos visitando un museo de gran importancia histórica.
translations.fr: Nous visitons un musée d’importance historique.
translations.it: Stiamo visitando un museo di grande importanza storica.
translations.ko: 우리는 역사적으로 중요한 박물관을 방문하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在参观一座具有重要历史意义的博物馆。
translations.yue: 我哋正參觀一間具有歷史意義嘅博物館。
translations.ru: Мы посещаем музей, имеющий историческое значение.
translations.pt: Estamos visitando um museu de grande importância histórica.
translations.he: אנחנו מבקרים במוזיאון בעל חשיבות היסטורית.
translations.tr: Tarihi açıdan önemli bir müzeyi ziyaret ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tham quan một bảo tàng có ý nghĩa lịch sử.
translations.ar: نحن نزور متحفًا ذا أهمية تاريخية.
translations.nl: We bezoeken een museum met historische betekenis.
translations.uk: Ми відвідуємо музей, що має історичне значення.
translations.hi: हम एक ऐतिहासिक महत्व वाले संग्रहालय का दौरा कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Επισκεπτόμαστε ένα μουσείο με ιστορική σημασία.
translations.nb: Vi besøker et museum med historisk betydning.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengunjungi museum yang memiliki makna sejarah.
translations.sv: Vi besöker ett museum med historisk betydelse.
translations.ro: Vizităm un muzeu de importanță istorică.
translations.da: Vi besøger et museum med historisk betydning.
translations.fi: Käymme museossa, jolla on historiallista merkitystä.
translations.ja: 私たちは歴史的に重要な博物館を訪れています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, finite (present, 1st person plural); takes a direct accusative object.
Indefinite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner for 'Museum'.
Adjectival form used adverbially (uninflected), modifying the following adjective 'bedeutendes' within the attributive phrase.
Attributive adjective (participle-based), neuter accusative singular; modifies 'Museum'.
Common noun, neuter singular, accusative; direct object of 'besuchen'.

translations.zh-Hans: 这些照片看起来很有年代感。
translations.vi: Những bức ảnh trông cổ xưa.
translations.nl: De foto’s zien er oud uit.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner for 'Fotos'.
Common noun, plural, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person plural) of the separable verb 'aussehen'; main predicate.
Predicative adjective complement describing the subject with 'aussehen'.
Separable verb particle of 'aussehen' placed at clause end; forms the full verb with 'sehen'.

sentences.target: Das Viertel wirkt historisch und lebendig.

translations.de: Das Viertel wirkt historisch und lebendig.
translations.en: The neighborhood feels historic and lively.
translations.es: El barrio se siente histórico y lleno de vida.
translations.fr: Le quartier paraît historique et animé.
translations.it: Il quartiere sembra storico e vivace.
translations.ko: 이 동네는 역사적인 느낌이 나고 활기가 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个街区既有历史感又很有活力。
translations.yue: 呢個街區有歷史感又好有活力。
translations.pt: O bairro parece histórico e animado.
translations.vi: Khu phố có cảm giác vừa cổ kính vừa sôi động.
translations.nl: De buurt voelt historisch en levendig aan.
translations.hu: A negyed történelminek és élénknek tűnik.
translations.hi: यह इलाका ऐतिहासिक और जीवंत महसूस होता है.
translations.pl: Dzielnica wydaje się historyczna i żywa.
translations.el: Η γειτονιά φαίνεται ιστορική και ζωντανή.
translations.id: Kawasan ini terasa bersejarah dan hidup.
translations.ro: Cartierul pare istoric și plin de viață.
translations.ja: この街は歴史的で、活気がある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determiner for 'Viertel'.
Common noun, neuter singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Lexical verb, finite (present, 3rd person singular); functions like a copular verb taking predicative complements.
Predicative adjective complement coordinated with 'lebendig'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicative adjectives.
Predicative adjective complement coordinated with 'historisch'.

translations.en: The area is shaped by history.
translations.es: La zona está marcada por la historia.
translations.fr: La région est marquée par l’histoire.
translations.it: La zona è segnata dalla storia.
translations.ko: 이 지역은 역사의 흔적이 묻어 있어요.
translations.pt: A região é marcada pela história.
translations.vi: Khu vực này mang đậm dấu ấn lịch sử.
translations.nl: De omgeving is doordrenkt van geschiedenis.
translations.hu: A környéket erősen áthatja a történelem.
translations.hi: यह इलाका इतिहास से प्रभावित है.
translations.el: Η περιοχή φέρει έντονο ιστορικό χαρακτήρα.
translations.ja: この地域は歴史の影響が色濃い。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner for 'Gegend'.
Common noun, feminine singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Copular auxiliary, finite (present, 3rd person singular); links subject to the predicative complement.
Adjectival form used adverbially (uninflected), modifying the participial adjective 'geprägt'.
Participial adjective (Partizip II from 'prägen'), predicative complement with the copula 'sein'.
